findings.description: Section s3 contains only the placeholder text 'なし' (3 characters), which is far below the 50-character threshold. The section has no substantive content and should not exist as a standalone section. The `+++++++++++++++++++++` dividers in the RST source are decorative horizontal rules, not section boundaries, so there is no source section that maps to s3.
findings.source_evidence: The RST source has exactly two h2 sections (ハンドラ処理フロー and 設定項目・拡張ポイント). The `+++` lines are visual dividers only. No content exists between ハンドラ処理フロー and 設定項目・拡張ポイント that would warrant a separate section.

findings.description: The property `immediate` (used in `RequestPathJavaPackageMapping`) appears in the multiple-packages configuration code example in s4 but is absent from the s4 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source code example: `<property name="immediate" value="false" />` appears twice in the multiple-packages setting example under 設定項目・拡張ポイント.
